mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.summary, s.category, s.categoryIcon, s.status, s.username, s.likeCount, s.commentCount, s.viewCount, s.collectCount, s.hotScore, s.createTime, ( SELECT t.name FROM assistant_feedback_tag ft JOIN assistant_feedback_category t ON t.id = ft.tag_id WHERE ft.feedback_id = s.id LIMIT 1 ) AS tagName FROM ( SELECT f.id, f.title, LEFT(f.content, 100) AS summary, IFNULL(c.name, '其它') AS category, IFNULL(c.icon, '📝') AS categoryIcon, f.status, u.username, IFNULL(f.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, IFNULL(f.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, IFNULL(f.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, IFNULL(f.collect_count, 0) AS collectCount, f.create_time AS createTime, ROUND( ( -- 0.35 × 点赞分（对数归一化） 0.35 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(f.like_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.like_count, 0))) FROM assistant_feedback x WHERE x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.status != 'CLOSED'), 0), 0) -- 0.25 × 收藏分（对数归一化） + 0.25 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(f.collect_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.collect_count, 0))) FROM assistant_feedback x WHERE x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.status != 'CLOSED'), 0), 0) -- 0.20 × 阅读分（对数归一化） + 0.20 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(f.view_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.view_count, 0))) FROM assistant_feedback x WHERE x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.status != 'CLOSED'), 0), 0) -- 0.10 × 评论分（对数归一化） + 0.10 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(f.comment_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.comment_count, 0))) FROM assistant_feedback x WHERE x.delete_flag = 0 AND x.status != 'CLOSED'), 0), 0) -- 0.10 × 状态加成（已处理最高 1.0，处理中 0.6，待处理 0.2，其余 0.4） + 0.10 * CASE f.status WHEN 'RESOLVED' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'PENDING_CONFIRM' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'PROCESSING' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'TRIAGED' THEN 0.4 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 0.2 ELSE 0.1 END ) -- 时间衰减系数 * CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.create_time, NOW()) <= 7 THEN 1.30 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.create_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.15 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.create_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 1.00 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.create_time, NOW()) <= 180 THEN 0.85 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.create_time, NOW()) <= 365 THEN 0.70 ELSE 0.55 END , 4) AS hotScore FROM assistant_feedback f LEFT JOIN assistant_feedback_category c ON c.id = f.category_id LEFT JOIN osh_user u ON u.id = f.user_id WHERE f.delete_flag = 0 AND f.status != 'CLOSED' ) s ORDER BY s.hotScore DESC, s.createTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}
